gxcr_context Struct Reference
[Crypto API (gxcr/gxcr.h)]

A context object that encapsulates data to be sent to the crypto acceleration hardware, including metadata related to the algorithm, and input and result data for the algorithm. More...


Data Fields

unsigned char * metadata_mem
 Pointer to the gxio-registered I/O memory in which this data resides.
gxcr_token_info_t token_info
 Internal information needed by this context.
int(* setup )(struct gxcr_context *crypto_context)
 Pointer to function that initializes the metadata based on the gxcr_context.
int(* start )(gxio_mica_context_t *mica_context, struct gxcr_context *crypto_context, void *src, int src_len, void *dst, int dst_len, gxcr_digest_stage_t digest_stage)
 Pointer to function to be called at processing time.
uint32_t internal0
 Internal data, not for direct access by user.
uint8_t internal1
 Internal data, not for direct access by user.
uint8_t internal2
 Internal data, not for direct access by user.

Detailed Description

A context object that encapsulates data to be sent to the crypto acceleration hardware, including metadata related to the algorithm, and input and result data for the algorithm.

The internals of this undocumented structure are not for direct use by users.

Examples:

mica/crypto/app.c.

Field Documentation

unsigned char* gxcr_context::metadata_mem

Pointer to the gxio-registered I/O memory in which this data resides.

gxcr_token_info_t gxcr_context::token_info

Internal information needed by this context.

int(* gxcr_context::setup)(struct gxcr_context *crypto_context)

Pointer to function that initializes the metadata based on the gxcr_context.

int(* gxcr_context::start)(gxio_mica_context_t *mica_context, struct gxcr_context *crypto_context, void *src, int src_len, void *dst, int dst_len, gxcr_digest_stage_t digest_stage)

Pointer to function to be called at processing time.

Internal data, not for direct access by user.

Internal data, not for direct access by user.

Internal data, not for direct access by user.
